Mean terrain slope (degrees) from SRTM 30m DEM

Sine of aspect angle — east-facing slope indicator
Days elapsed since the last recorded fire in the same grid cell

Distance (m) to nearest forest/track road from OpenStreetMap
Distance (m) to nearest populated settlement from OpenStreetMap
Log-transformed distance to nearest road (normalizes skewed distribution)
Log-transformed distance to nearest forest road
Log-transformed distance to nearest settlement

FWI × Wind Speed — amplifies risk when wind accelerates fire spread

Wind × Road Distance — human access under wind-driven fire conditions

Cosine encoding of month — captures cyclical seasonality

Cosine of wind direction — directional wind component
